name: venobox
description: Responsive javascript modal window plugin, touch swipe gallery

scripts.build:css: cleancss src/venobox.css -o dist/venobox.min.css --source-map --source-map-inline-sources && cleancss src/venobox.css -o dist/venobox.css --format keep-breaks
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js

author: Nicola Franchini (https://veno.es/)
